dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8150 IH: Good Friday Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Ogles introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend title 4, United States Code, to require the flag to be flown at half-staff on the first Friday and Saturday after the full Moon that occurs on or after the spring equinox, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Good Friday Act of 2026.

section.header: Position and manner of flag display
section.text: Section 7(m) of title 4, Unites States Code, is amended by inserting The flag shall be flown at half-staff on the first Friday and Saturday after the full Moon that occurs on or after the spring equinox. after Armed Forced Day..
